name: Boulder Town Hall
description: Come play pickleball at Boulder Town Hall in Boulder, UT! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Escalante City Old Gym
description: Escalante City Old Gym is a place to play pickleball in Escalante, UT. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
fees:
Fee required — $5 per day 
$20 per month

name: Escalante Sports Club
description: Escalante Sports Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Escalante, UT. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Panguitch Sport Complex
description: Panguitch Sport Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Panguitch, UT. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.
